title: Gawd Migration Bundle Manifest
description: Manifest schema for the top-level manifest.json file inside a gawd-export bundle. Produced by gawd-export; validated by validate-bundle before atomic-rename. See spec <install-root>/docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-26-gawd-architecture-design.md §7.2 and handoff F1.

bundle_format_version.description: Semver of the bundle layout. Bumped when the directory contract changes.

gawd_id.description: The Gawd's instance identifier (from IDENTITY.md Name + Born). Used as a sanity check at import; mismatch is informational, not fatal (a Prophit may rename).

source_rung.description: Which rung of the sovereignty ladder the export originated from.

destination_rung_hint.description: Optional hint about the destination rung. Informational; import does not enforce against this.

exported_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the bundle was produced.

exporter_hostname.description: Hostname of the source substrate. Diagnostic only.

bundle_size_bytes_uncompressed.description: Total uncompressed size of all bundle contents in bytes. Sanity check at import.

embeddings_present.description: Whether memory.lancedb.tar is included in the bundle. False means the Gawd is newly born or memory was intentionally not exported.

embedding_index_count.description: Number of vectors indexed at export time. Validated against the staged index at import; deviation > 0 with present index fails validation.

prophit_count.description: Number of Prophit profiles in the bundle (1 = single-Prophit; 2+ = multi-Prophit / household).

file_inventory.description: Authoritative list of every file inside the bundle (relative to bundle root), with size + sha256. Validated at import: any missing/extra/mismatched file fails the bundle.

path.description: Path relative to the bundle root (e.g., 'soul/SOUL.md').

sha256.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 of the file content.

notes.description: Free-form human-readable notes captured by gawd-export (e.g., 'soul deltas only', 'fresh from forge'). Informational.
